examples: He achieved the success he so richly deserved.
Derartu is an outstanding athlete and deserved to win.
It was a question which deserved serious consideration.
"This double accolade is uniquely deserved, " said Sir Peter Stothard, chairman of the judges.
Converted tries from Rocky Elsom and Quade Cooper gave the Wallabies a well-deserved 14-0 lead at half-time.
